room.caption: [CaveNetworkB] Careful what you break.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(18)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backLabyrinthRuinsA backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999 backFollow.image_xscale=1.8; backFollow.image_yscale=2
roomLighting=instance_create(0,0,oSurfLightF)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(5) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
